name: subscriptions_processing_workflow
description: Workflow for processing subscriptions entity that marks entity as processed and performs secondary tasks.

transitions.name: mark_entity_processed
transitions.description: Mark the subscriptions entity as processed by setting workflowProcessed to true.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed.

externalized_processors.name: process_mark_entity_as_processed
externalized_processors.description: Marks the subscriptions entity as processed.

transitions.name: execute_secondary_tasks
transitions.description: Perform secondary tasks for the subscriptions entity.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has finished processing secondary tasks.

externalized_processors.name: process_secondary_tasks
externalized_processors.description: Executes any secondary tasks for the subscriptions entity.
